{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231945369FB646117EA4D2BAF9C1"}"},"total":937},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7544036006707954456","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第一次看这种写历史的文，情节设置得挺有意思，万界直播，直接对着老祖宗们贴脸开大哈哈哈，老祖宗们的反应也都特别有趣，文笔是真的不错，一度以为作者是真的学历史的，逻辑也很清晰，包括各种分析和推理，连着看了好几天看完了，想看后续会不会真的有穿越的情节，坐等更新"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756485776,"group_id":"7399178905703173145","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"美酒轻裘，挑灯走马，一生无牵挂。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N41CprGzB7XPwKKUoK6lsnrU0nMP8SxJMEzpZMGlmi4p","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1567595fa00f4e538ecfb04b698df222~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792065&x-signature=ajH7zH67fKd54JpcdRDpNBzMRrY%3D","user_id":"2590907893286094","user_name":"睡不着的乖乖冰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2590907893286094","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7399178905703173145","book_info":{"abstract":"历史系毕业即失业的唐欣欣，决定一边旅游一边直播科普历史，没想到自己的直播竟然可以播放到历史万界，被老祖们看到。
